title: Kimetsu no Yaiba (Demon-Slayer)
description: Kimetsu no Yaiba (Demon-Slayer) is a RPG Modpack for players wanting to become a demon/demon slayer!
body:
![Banner Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Kimetsu_no_Yaiba/BH_KnYDS_header.webp)
[![Banner Bisecthosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Kimetsu_no_Yaiba/BH_KnYDS_promo.webp)](https://tinyurl.com/amy67484)
![Banner Overview](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Kimetsu_no_Yaiba/BH_KnYDS_overview.webp)
---
**Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba** a Modpack based upon the Demon Slayer Anime/Manga. Enjoy the world from Kimetsu No Yaiba in Minecraft! Choose from a variety of weapons, clothing, armour, foods and so much more... Built around a central Demon Slayer Mod, alongside content and QOL Mods, this Modpack brings the best Demon Slayer experience into Minecraft.

[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/kimetsunoyaiba)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/kimetsunoyaiba)
[![kofi-plural-alt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-plural-alt_vector.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/kesselot)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/7nR4LELDs78?si=Y4jmQcHMjNpuTZvN" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Banner Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Kimetsu_no_Yaiba/BH_KnYDS_features.webp)
---
- [✔️] **Kimetsu no Yaiba** - Demon slayers and the demons that want to kill them, new dimensions, weapons and more.
- [✔️] **Time To Explore** - This world holds a lot of mystery, run down structures and structures filled with loot from Kimetsu no Yaiba.
- [✔️] **New Animations** - Enjoy a variety of fresh animations alongside new battle animations, wield the mightiest of weapons and practice the demon arts.

[![Banner Discord](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Kimetsu_no_Yaiba/BH_KnYDS_discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/N8tUm6N4Qc)
### Modpack Notes
- **If you are a Youtuber or Content Creator playing this Modpack, put a link in the description linking back to this page so people know the Modpack you are using.**
- **Reupload of this Modpack or any modified version is not allowed allowed on Modrinth or CurseForge, this includes redistribution to any other website.** (_Unless given explicit permission by myself_)
